name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Capitol Hill is an indoor golf and entertainment venue located in Seattle. It features state-of-the-art Trackman simulators where players can practice, play virtual courses, or participate in multi-sport activities. The venue combines a driving range, clubhouse, and sports bar, offering a full-service bar with craft cocktails and local brews, as well as a chef-inspired menu. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals, with members enjoying free play and discounts on food, beverages, and other services. It is suitable for both serious golfers and beginners, with a no-dress-code atmosphere and a variety of social and competitive activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 200+ world-class virtual golf courses like Pebble Beach and Pinehurst
State-of-the-art Trackman technology providing accurate launch data and swing analysis
Flexible membership model offering free play and discounts on food and instruction
Full-service bar and restaurant with a lively social atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar featuring craft cocktails and local brews

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing accurate data on ball flight, spin rate, and swing metrics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available, though you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring in my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, but the venue offers a full-service bar and kitchen with a wide variety of food and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and your pace, but it generally takes between 2 to 3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf Capitol Hill is kid-friendly and offers party packages for children's events and junior clinics.
